description: CompositionRed jersey made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, piping from the chest to hem and embroidered branding on left chestFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash in lukewarm waterDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureCool ironDo not dry cleanpuma, the classic Sports brand, celebrates minimalistic styles in its sport themed wear. This puma dry fit jersey is designed to wick away sweat and keep you looking your fashionable best. Pair it with an oversized jacket, a fitted pair of denims and sleek sports shoes. Model statisticsThe model wears a size M with height 6' and shoulders 18"
